title: cancellaria zeylonica
intro: Cancellaria zeylonica, also known as the Pigeon's Droppings or Coral Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to tropical regions of the world. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cancellaria zeylonica include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Cancellaria zeylonica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
